# Differential-oracle vectors: REAL chrony siv_nettle_int.c (AES-SIV-CMAC-256,
# RFC 5297), compiled from /tmp/chrony-src commit 120dfb8 over a nettle-compatible
# shim whose AES-128 is FIPS-197-verified (see AESKAT). The SIV/CMAC/S2V code is
# the real chrony source. AESKAT = AES128(key=0^16, block=0^16). IN: per-case key
# (32B s2v||ctr), ad, nonce, plaintext (all hex). CASE: lengths. CT: SIV||ciphertext.
# DEC/PT: decrypt verification + recovered plaintext. The rfc5297_a1 case is the
# RFC 5297 Appendix A.1 worked example. Consumer is Rust; NO Python.
AESKAT 66e94bd4ef8a2c3b884cfa59ca342b2e
IN rfc5297_a1 key=fffefdfcfbfaf9f8f7f6f5f4f3f2f1f0f0f1f2f3f4f5f6f7f8f9fafbfcfdfeff ad=101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f2021222324252627 nonce= pt=112233445566778899aabbccddee
CASE rfc5297_a1 al=24 nl=0 pl=14
CT 85632d07c6e8f37f950acd320a2ecc9340c02b9690c4dc04daef7f6afe5c
DEC ok=1
PT 112233445566778899aabbccddee
IN empty_pt key=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f ad=aabb nonce=00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff pt=
CASE empty_pt al=2 nl=16 pl=0
CT 53b0371c85df5d46a609f7cc171f7cb7
DEC ok=1
PT 
IN p1 key=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f ad= nonce=00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff pt=5a
CASE p1 al=0 nl=16 pl=1
CT 2d9250f916250a8cddb4473e7839d49e8e
DEC ok=1
PT 5a
IN p15 key=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f ad=0102030405 nonce=00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff pt=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e
CASE p15 al=5 nl=16 pl=15
CT d5b012096943f15453794f622eb6d01e7dfcf97df515db0a33a413c1d7f158
DEC ok=1
PT 000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e
IN p16 key=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f ad=0102030405 nonce=00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff pt=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f
CASE p16 al=5 nl=16 pl=16
CT 10fa241dadde6ef309e310790bebad25cc42073a08a216110ae7338f9016df5f
DEC ok=1
PT 000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f
IN p17 key=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f ad=0102030405 nonce=00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff pt=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f10
CASE p17 al=5 nl=16 pl=17
CT 14dbfbd3335437315a2be3dd40b7c94a37d636d022725edc0e7a9e04c87c161d53
DEC ok=1
PT 000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f10
IN p40 key=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f ad=deadbeefcafe nonce=00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff pt=00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff0011223344556677
CASE p40 al=6 nl=16 pl=40
CT 8d2073719955501aafa638ebc5e3b5625ed09c9a160230cb9cbdc0183b88b5e518539a5798c4c52ce35dfd61563e84b2627ca44495d53234
DEC ok=1
PT 00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff0011223344556677
IN noad_nonce key=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f ad= nonce=00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff pt=abcdef
CASE noad_nonce al=0 nl=16 pl=3
CT 2cc27405f8ed52da0c6783897f8ad3c008d885
DEC ok=1
PT abcdef
IN both_empty key=000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f ad= nonce= pt=
CASE both_empty al=0 nl=0 pl=0
CT 40104e8db8d421e74222e6381b4f50fa
DEC ok=1
PT
